Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class SpaHostingOptions

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Configures SPA hosting within the WebView. Supports serving embedded resources (production) or proxying to a dev server (development) via a custom app:// scheme.

public sealed class SpaHostingOptions
Inheritance
object
SpaHostingOptions
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Properties

ActiveAssetDirectoryProvider

Optional callback that returns currently active external asset directory. When provided and returning a non-empty path, SPA hosting serves assets from that directory.

public Func<string?>? ActiveAssetDirectoryProvider { get; init; }

Property Value

Func<string>

AutoInjectBridgeScript

When true, the Bridge client script is auto-injected into pages served via this scheme. Default: true.

public bool AutoInjectBridgeScript { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

DefaultHeaders

Additional response headers to include with every served resource. Useful for CSP headers, CORS, etc.

public IDictionary<string, string>? DefaultHeaders { get; init; }

Property Value

IDictionary<string, string>

DevServerUrl

When set, proxies all app:// requests to this URL (e.g. "http://localhost:5173"). Used for development with HMR (Vite, webpack, etc.).

public string? DevServerUrl { get; init; }

Property Value

string

EmbeddedResourcePrefix

The embedded resource prefix (e.g. "wwwroot"). Files in this folder are served as app://localhost/{relative-path}. Must be set when DevServerUrl is null.

public string? EmbeddedResourcePrefix { get; init; }

Property Value

string

EntryPointUri

Builds the entry point URL. Example: "app://localhost/index.html".

public Uri EntryPointUri { get; }

Property Value

Uri

FallbackDocument

The root document served for SPA router fallback. Default: "index.html". When a request path has no file extension, this document is served.

public string FallbackDocument { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Host

The host component of the custom scheme URL. Default: "localhost".

public string Host { get; init; }

Property Value

string

ResourceAssembly

The assembly containing embedded resources. Required when EmbeddedResourcePrefix is set.

public Assembly? ResourceAssembly { get; init; }

Property Value

Assembly

Scheme

The custom scheme name. Default: "app". The WebView navigates to {Scheme}://localhost/index.html.

public string Scheme { get; init; }

Property Value

string

ServiceWorker

Optional service worker configuration for offline support. When set, the SPA host can register a service worker with the specified options.

public ServiceWorkerOptions? ServiceWorker { get; init; }

Property Value

ServiceWorkerOptions

Agibuild.Fulora — Cross-platform Hybrid App Framework
